mapper.select: /*MstoreMapper.getMspCusInfo 계약 현행화 정보 */ WITH CTI AS ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND CUSTOMER_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY REP_NO, SYS_RDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) SELECT B.CUSTOMER_SSN AS USER_SSN ,B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS EMPEN ,B.CUSTOMER_ID ,B.CUSTOMER_TYPE ,B.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS USER_NAME ,A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO ,A.SRL_IF_ID AS RES_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO @DL_MSP A ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO @DL_MSP B ,CTI C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.SUB_STATUS != 'C' ORDER BY SUB_STATUS, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE

/*MstoreMapper.getMcpRequestInfo MCP 신청정보 조회 */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM ,C.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS EMPEN FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A ,MCP_REQUEST B ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR C WHERE A.SRL_IF_ID= B.RES_NO AND A.CONTRACT_NUM= B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.CUSTOMER_ID= #{customerId} AND NVL(A.SRL_IF_ID, '0') != '0' AND C.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND B.CSTMR_TYPE != 'NM'

/*MstoreMapper.selectMstoreCanTrgList MSTORE 연동 대상 조회*/ SELECT CAN_TRG_SEQ ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(selfCstmrCi) AS selfCstmrCi ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(userName) AS userName FROM( SELECT A.CAN_TRG_SEQ ,NVL(B.SELF_CSTMR_CI, (SELECT V3.SELF_CSTMR_CI FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP V1 ,MCP_REQUEST V2 ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR V3 WHERE V1.SRL_IF_ID= V2.RES_NO AND V1.CONTRACT_NUM= V2.CONTRACT_NUM AND V2.REQUEST_KEY = V3.REQUEST_KEY AND V1.CUSTOMER_ID= A.CUSTOMER_ID AND NVL(V1.SRL_IF_ID, '0') != '0' AND V3.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM= 1)) AS selfCstmrCi ,B.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS userName FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG A ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID= B.CUSTOMER_ID(+) AND A.CUSTOMER_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CAN_TRG_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

/*MstoreMapper.selectMstoreCanListNew MSTORE 연동 대상 조회*/ SELECT CAN_TRG_SEQ ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(selfCstmrCi) AS selfCstmrCi ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(userName) AS userName FROM ( SELECT A.CAN_TRG_SEQ, B.EMPEN AS selfCstmrCi, C.NAME AS userName FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG A ,NMCP_MSTORE_SSO_INFO B ,MCP_USER C WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID AND B.USERID = C.USERID AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CAN_TRG_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

/*MstoreMapper.selectMstoreCanListRty MSTORE 연동 대상 조회*/ SELECT CAN_TRG_SEQ ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(selfCstmrCi) AS selfCstmrCi ,CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(userName) AS userName FROM ( SELECT A.CAN_TRG_SEQ, B.EMPEN AS selfCstmrCi, C.NAME AS userName FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG A ,NMCP_MSTORE_SSO_INFO B ,MCP_USER C ,NMCP_MSTORE_PROC_HIST D WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID AND B.USERID = C.USERID AND A.PROC_HIST_SEQ = D.HIST_SEQ AND A.PROC_YN = 'Y' AND A.PROC_TRG_YN= 'Y' AND D.RESULT_CODE != '00' ORDER BY CAN_TRG_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50
